creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 225718
git diff for devel/tailor

I've been cobbling on and using this for awhile.
But it's time to update this and host it on GitLab
to get some more input.
I've added some stuff, moved some stuff around and
updated/corrected some of the docs. Tag it 0.9.37.

Please find git diff attached for details.

Thanks! :-)

builds/installs/works/uninstalls as intended on
12 and 13 amd64
